arts.ttl: Report: PL scouts to watch Leeds United v Sunderland
arts.sum: Tottenham and Crystal Palace scouts are claimed to be attending Leeds United v Sunderland tonight, but luckily for the Whites, they have a Black Cats star in their sights. Leeds and Sunderland boast arguably the most talented sides in the division this season, and it’s no surprise that reports from the Express relay claims that Tottenham and Crystal Palace scouts will be keeping track of events at Elland Road tonight.

arts.ttl: How did Roma midfielder Le Fee end up joining promotion-chasing Sunderland?
arts.sum: After Trai Hume found him with a pass that made its way through the legs of Luton's Lamine Fanne with concerning ease, he rolled his right foot over the ball, took a touch to steady himself, a touch to set himself and then hit a shot that curled and dipped before landing in the bottom right corner of the net.

arts.ttl: Harry Gray shares reaction to eye-catching Leeds United moment over the weekend
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Harry Gray recovered from long-term back issues recently and is making light work of U21 football right now. Harry Gray scores twice for U21s in win v Derby on Saturday

arts.ttl: Sunderland XI vs Leeds – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Sunderland take on Leeds United in the Championship tonight looking to remain in touch with the automatic places. Régis Le Bris has exceeded expectations at the Stadium of Light to lead Sunderland to fourth in the table. Tonight the Black Cats take on an in-form Leeds side who sit second, seven points above them. arts.sum: Leeds United host Sunderland in the Championship this evening as the promotion rivals go head-to-head at Elland Road. Daniel Farke’s side are second the race for promotion and have been in scintillating recent form. Leeds have won seven of their last eight games and have not conceded a goal during that run, with their goal […] The post Leeds vs Sunderland – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Sheffield United are set to welcome Gustavo Hamer, Tom Cannon and Kieffer Moore back for the clash with… The post Sheffield United given triple injury boost ahead of huge Leeds United tie appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Sunderland: Could Meslier have last laugh tonight?
arts.sum: Leeds United’s clash against Sunderland tonight will prompt horrific flashbacks for Whites fans on Illan Meslier’s howler at the Stadium of Light, but he enters tonight’s game in serious form. This fixture was a hectic one in the reverse, as they shared the spoils in a 2-2 victory that Leeds will wonder how on earth they didn’t win, thanks to a howler in the dying moments from Illan Meslier.

arts.ttl: Jayden Bogle sent Sunderland warning as Leeds United look to land knockout blow
arts.sum: Leeds United know they must not lose against Sunderland to reclaim top spot in the Championship, and will be aiming to extend their winning run to four league games. It means that a win for United over Sunderland will not only down the North East club but also stretch their lead from third place to seven points - a significant gap at this stage of the Championship season.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder: No pressure on Leeds v Sunderland
arts.sum: Leeds United moved to second on Saturday when Sheffield United secured victory away at Luton Town, with the Whites looking to reclaim top spot and clear a gap to third with victory over Sunderland tonight. Naturally, a promotion rival winning in the days before a big game at Elland Road is going to bring pressure on the result.
